intro.title: Hi, Kuchupuchu.
intro.text:
You asked me for one month.

Not to become perfect.

But to become better.

This isn't just a website.

It's a journey.

Every page you are about to see comes from my heart.

Every memory is real.

Every mistake is real.

Every lesson is real.

Thank you for giving me one more chance.

chapter1.title: Every story begins with a hello.
chapter1.subtitle: Before everything else... there was just one message.
